_comment: Copy to config.json and adjust. `ollama_url` is REQUIRED when backend='ollama' — set it to the LAN/host Ollama URL (e.g. http://<host>:11434). There is NO default: the Qt console refuses to start an ollama backend without this key (see claude_worker.py::DEFAULT_OLLAMA_URL). `ollama_mac_url` defaults to http://localhost:11434 if omitted and is only read when backend='ollama_mac'.
